title: Village Life Stories: Shareholder Alyce Walluk
summary: Village Life Stories: Shareholder Alyce Walluk “I was raised the Inupiaq traditional lifestyle during the early 1950s on the Seward Peninsula between the villages of Wales and Mary’s Igloo, Alaska.
